question: Validate the proposed transfer, refund/reversal, and cash-withdrawal spend policies with representative transactions.
context: Resolved from direct owner policy. The former bundled cash-withdrawal ambiguity moved to OQ-LEDGER-16 so transfer implementation is no longer blocked by an unrelated cash-account choice.
decision: Owner decision on 2026-07-21: movements between owned accounts are transfers and contribute zero External Spend or Budget Actual while both bank-account legs remain ordinary queryable account movements. Normal banking semantics apply to separately recorded bank fees as spend and linked refunds or reversals as offsets to the original spend. Cash-withdrawal treatment is deliberately separated into OQ-LEDGER-16.
